/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -ffast-math -march=native -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FluidSim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FluidSim.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/FluidSim.dir/fluid.c.o -o FluidSim  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so /usr/lib64/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib64/libX11.so /usr/lib64/libXext.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/16/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.a
